## XInjectKey interface

Type of the key passed to [XProvide()](./x-components.xprovide.md) and [XInject()](./x-components.xinject.md) to be type-safe. With this type you can declare the type of the injected value directly in the injection key.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface XInjectKey<Type> extends String 
```
<b>Extends:</b> String

## Example

`const myKey: XInjectKey<Filter> = 'myFilter';` `@XInject(myKey)`
